name: Smig
description:
The Smig can roll with different barrels, each changing its stats:
- Tediore: faster reloads and better accuracy, but lower bullet damage.
- Bandit: higher bullet damage, but worse accuracy.
- Maliwan: improved accuracy. If the gun also spawns with an element, its title changes accordingly, and the Maliwan barrel also boosts elemental effect chance.
notes:
It always comes with an exceptionally large magazine. Salvador (Filled to the Brim) and Krieg (Blood-Filled Guns) can keep it firing for a long time, which makes it strong for clearing groups.

A comparable Scav-made weapon in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the SMG.
